text: One résumé bullet or achievement, stated as a real fact. Keep each chunk to a single accomplishment — the retriever surfaces the few most relevant of these per job, and the cold-email writer is allowed to use ONLY these facts (an anti-fabrication guardrail).
tags: keywords that appear literally in matching job posts

text: Built backend services in FastAPI and Spring Boot, integrating PostgreSQL and a cloud data warehouse.
Trained computer-vision models with PyTorch and OpenCV, reaching 90% detection accuracy on a custom dataset.
